column1: # mapping_set_title: "GDSC Gaia Catalog KoboToolbox Form v2 to Schema.org JSON-LD (Record 217: 1984 Tanzania 2m Temperature)"

# mapping_set_description: "Full SSSOM crosswalk from KoboToolbox raw JSON (gaia_metadata_authoring_form_v2, record 217) to Schema.org JSON-LD per GDSC conventions. Generated from scratch using prompt template v2. Covers all mappable fields; TBD/-- and Kobo system fields in UNMAPPED table."

column13: comment

Each Kobo submission becomes one Schema.org Dataset. Emit @id from etl_group/table_name as https://gdsc.idsc.miami.edu/detail/{table_name}. Extend @context with qudt, xsd, pato and set @language to en.
Kobo title is the Schema.org Dataset name.
Dataset abstract or description.
Dataset landing page URL.
Map known Kobo license codes to full URIs; odc_by has no CC equivalent — flag for human review and store as-is if unrecognised.
Value is "Public domain" (not a CC URI); cc_to_boolean should emit true for public domain declarations — flag for human review.
Free-text access restriction note maps to schema:conditionsOfAccess; value "N/A" may be conditionally omitted in transform.
BCP-47 language code maps exactly to schema:inLanguage.
Publication date in ISO 8601 format.
Explicit dataset-level temporal start; combine with time_period_end to emit ISO 8601 interval string (e.g. 1984-01-01/1984-12-31) as temporalCoverage.
Controlled value "raster_dataset" mapped to a DefinedTerm under dct:type; inDefinedTermSet pointing to GDSC resource type vocab.
Provenance note "Copernicus" has no direct Schema.org equivalent; stored as a named PropertyValue on the dataset.

Map creator_name→Organization.name, creator_identifier_schema_uri→Organization.@id (ROR URI confirmed from record: https://ror.org/00yafkq43 for Copernicus — verify); wrap in Role with roleName=creator.
Map publisher_name→Organization.name; ROR for "OHDSI" not confirmed in this record — flag for human review.
Map coverage_name→Place.name; build GeoNames additionalProperty from coverage_identifier (149590 = Tanzania) and coverage_identifier_schema_uri; bounding box must be supplied externally.
Subject terms collected into a flat string array for schema:keywords.
Emit DefinedTerm with termCode=value (raster); inDefinedTermSet pointing to GDSC dataRepresentation vocab.
Raster band names (e.g. "t2m") have no direct Schema.org equivalent; each band stored as a named PropertyValue on the dataset. Sub-field band_name→PropertyValue.value.
Pixel resolution value "0.25" has no direct Schema.org equivalent; stored as a named PropertyValue; pair with dimension_units for full meaning.
Unit for pixel resolution ("degrees") stored as a named PropertyValue; no direct Schema.org property for raster resolution units.
Append to spatialCoverage.additionalProperty as PropertyValue with name=Spatial Reference System and full OGC SRS URI as value.
Value "29|-12|41|-0.8" is a pipe-delimited bounding box; parse to schema:GeoShape with box property formatted as "minLat minLon maxLat maxLon" and attach to spatialCoverage.

Map attribute_name→name, attribute_description→description, attribute_type→qudt:dataType (numeric→xsd:float), attribute_unit→unitText, attribute_unit_concept_id→unitCode lookup, attribute_min_value→minValue, attribute_start_date+attribute_end_date→additionalProperty temporal_interval, attribute_concept_id→alternateName, attribute_external_id→identifier.
Derive ISO 8601 interval string (min start_date/max end_date) across all attribute temporal metadata rows; supplements the explicit time_period_start/end row above.
Split on space; each token becomes a DataCatalog with @id=https://gdsc.idsc.miami.edu/?collection={token}. Always prepend root GDSC DataCatalog entry (https://gdsc.idsc.miami.edu).
Map sponsor_name→Organization.name and sponsor_url→Organization.url; ROR IDs for TuftsCTSI, IDSC, and UM Library not confirmed — flag for human review.
Catalog workflow status "published" maps to schema:creativeWorkStatus; confidence moderate as this is a GDSC operational field.
Emit {"@type":"DataDownload","name":"Source distribution","contentUrl":value}; merge with format and extension mappings.
File name becomes the name field of the DataDownload object in schema:distribution.
zip should become application/zip or remain as source extension string if MIME type is unknown.
nc (NetCDF) should become application/netcdf or remain as format string if MIME mapping is unavailable.
Gaia/PostGIS table name is operational metadata with no direct Schema.org target.
ETL pipeline custom parameter string has no Schema.org equivalent; stored as a named PropertyValue for pipeline reproducibility.
ETL service descriptor "api python cdsapi" has no Schema.org equivalent; stored as a named PropertyValue.
Download method "python" is an operational ETL instruction with no Schema.org equivalent; stored as a named PropertyValue.
Last data update in ISO 8601 format.
Update frequency maps to Dublin Core accrual periodicity.
